brief.headline: 29.06.2026: gemini · personalized
brief.executive_summary:
Am 29.06.2026 wurden 13 relevante Branchen-Meldungen aus 5 Quellen erfasst. Die thematischen Schwerpunkte lagen bei gemini · personalized.

Die wichtigsten Meldungen des Tages sind nachfolgend kuratiert — sortiert nach Recency und Quellen-Autorität. Vollständige Artikel-Liste unten.

trends.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
trends.what: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

trends.title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
trends.what: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.

trends.title: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘RAMageddon’
trends.what: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.

trends.title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
trends.what: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.

trends.title: Cursor now has a mobile app for guiding your coding agent on the go
trends.what: Cursor has launched a new mobile app for remote oversight over coding agents.

trends.title: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
trends.what: In addition, TIDAL will use automated tools to remove AI-generated music that attempts to impersonate an artist or a group, the company said.
